sn1.21:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. Standing to one side, that devata recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn1.21:1.0.2: v.51"As if smitten by a sword,As if his head were on fire,A bhikkhu should wander mindfullyTo abandon sensual lust."
sn1.21:1.0.3: v.52"As if smitten by a sword,As if his head were on fire,A bhikkhu should wander mindfullyTo abandon identity view."
